snippet.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Avi Arad

snippet.title: SHREK 5 | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
It’s happening... it’s really happening!  Experience Shrek 5 only in theatres summer 2027.

Welcome to the swamp! Join Shrek, Fiona, Donkey, Puss in Boots, and the whole Far Far Away crew for epic quests, fairy tale twists, and plenty of laughs. Like ogres and onions, this channel has layers: from iconic movie moments to Swamp Talk segments and shorts, you’ll find videos for Shrek fans of all ages. And stick around, because Shrek 5 hits theaters in 2027.

Welcome to a brand new Minecraft Single player Let's Play World currently in Minecraft Version Update 26.1. This is a forever world which means I will keep this world updated with each new Minecraft update throughout the years and one day hopefully share it with my daughter. 💕
Today I'm building a whimsical little iron farm using the power of villagers, zombies and many many iron golems but of course I had to add a little whimsy to the whole operation by decorating it with an ancient overgrown iron golem statue.

Please boop the like button if you enjoy the video! :)

snippet.title: THE ROOM RETURNS - Official Trailer (HD)
snippet.description:
What happens when great actors collide with what some consider the worst script ever written? Tommy Wiseau’s original THE ROOM (2003) infamously burned through $6 million and months of shooting with no-name actors. This reimagining flips the myth on its head. Filmed in under 12 hours, on virtually no budget, with Bob Odenkirk (Better Call Saul), Bella Heathcote (The Neon Demon), Kate Siegel (Hush), Greg Sestero (the original Room), executive producer Mike Flanagan (The Haunting of Hill House), and directed by newcomer Brando Crawford. With no rehearsal and only teleprompters to guide them, the cast embraced the chaos with Shakespearean gravity, transforming cinematic disaster into unpredictable spectacle… all for charity.

LA Premiere on June 26th at Hollywood Forever following Sold out screenings in Chicago and NYC. Tickets at actingforacause.org

All proceeds benefit amfAR, The Foundation for AIDS Research, and Blue Collaborative (501c3)

snippet.title: Can You Beat Forza WITHOUT DRIVING? - Forza Horizon 6 Is A Perfectly Balanced Game With NO EXPLOITS
snippet.description:
Welcome to the wonderful world of forza horizon 6! 
Thanks to Boot Dev For Sponsoring this video, Click this link https://boot.dev/?promo=SPIFFING and use my code SPIFFING to get 25% off your first payment for boot.dev.

The latest driving game in the forza horizon series and this one is set with the backdrop of Japan and it looks FANTASTIC! Now forza 6 is a racing game where you must drive, drift and drag your way to a speedy victory using all aspects of your driving skill. However I wanted to see if it was actually possible for a player to finish the entire game and get the golden wristband and access to legend island without ever having to drive the car! Thats right today I The Spiffing Brit will do the No Driving In A Driving Game challenge and once and for all find out if you can Beat Forza WITHOUT DRIVING?

Some quick facts Forza Horizon 6 is a 2026 racing game developed by Playground Games and published by Xbox Game Studios. It is the sixth Forza Horizon title, following Forza Horizon 5, and the fourteenth main instalment in the Forza franchise. I know its on xbox gamepass but if you are lucky you can grab it here on a steam summer sale when the time is right! https://store.steampowered.com/app/2483190/Forza_Horizon_6/

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

snippet.description:
FIRST LOOK AT GRAY HULK?! Spider-Man Brand New Day New Trailer Reaction. SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER 2 REACTION — We're watching the new Brand New Day trailer for the first time and we are NOT okay. Gray Hulk, Scorpion, Punisher, and is Sadie Sink playing Jean Grey?! Peter's mutation, the "bye someone" moment, Aunt May's voiceover — this trailer destroyed us.We react to every major moment: Peter's black eyes and organic webbing mutation, Bruce Banner warning "if you see me with this off, RUN," Punisher not recognizing Peter at all ("who the hell are you?!"), Spider-Man vs. Scorpion, The Hand ninjas, and the unseen villain that only Peter can sense. MJ swinging alongside Spider-Man at the end hit different too.Spider-Man: Brand New Day hits theaters July 31, 2026 — and after this trailer, we cannot wait.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: The Fifth Element - Official Trailer (2026) - Bruce Willis, Milla Jovovich, Gary Oldman
snippet.description:
In the colorful future, cabdriver Korben Dallas unwittingly becomes the central figure in the search for a legendary cosmic weapon to keep the great evil and Jean-Baptiste Emmanuel Zorg at bay. This special release includes exclusive insight from Leonard Maltin.

Bruce Willis stars as Korben Dallas, a New York cab driver turned unlikely hero in this timeless story about love and survival set in the 23rd century. In this future world posited by acclaimed director or “Lucy” and “The Professional,” humanity has wandered out among the stars, spreading the life-energy of the universe and further agitating the dark force, whose time to strike back occurs only once every 5,000 years, when a doorway between the parallel dimensions briefly opens. That time is now, and Zorg (Gary Oldman), the agent of darkness, intends to take advantage of it. Humanity’s hopes may lie with Leeloo (Milla Jovovich), who represents the fifth element, the life force. Leeloo holds unimaginable powers, but she needs help, and Korben befriends her. Nothing less than the future of the universe is in their hands.

Director: Luc Besson
Writers: Luc Besson, Robert Mark Kamen
Stars: Bruce Willis, Milla Jovovich, Gary Oldman
Tickets: https://regmovi.es/3QHIoMN

snippet.title: Everything that Ever Happens in Dark Souls 1
snippet.description:
This is my most comprehensive video on the story and lore of Dark Souls ever, today we commence the series detailing the theory of everything for the Dark Souls series, beginning with Dark Souls 1 we delve into the story before dark souls, all the way to its inevitable end. Along the way we discuss all the lore related to the characters, wider regions and even bosses cohesively into the story as a whole, and boy is there a story here.

As always these are all my opinions, though large amounts of research go into videos such as these, there will always be some level of subjective world building required by Souls Games, you’re likely to have a different opinion - that’s fine, and is a cornerstone of why Dark Souls discourse is as alive as well today as it was the day the first game was released.

snippet.title: Parades Pack Announcement Trailer | Planet Coaster 2
snippet.description:
Become the conductor of celebration in the biggest Planet Coaster 2 Pack yet. 

Conduct a concert of celebration in the biggest Planet Coaster 2 pack to date! Create extravagant parades with colour, movement and excitement lining every street. Turn your plazas into bustling, vibrant centrepieces which offer the perfect welcome using 200 new Small Town scenery pieces, and say 'Hayo!' to a charming new Entertainer. Cue the Fireworks!  

From spectacular parades, firework shows that fill the night sky and 5 all-new attractions, build an epic celebration for your park guests to enjoy.  

Available on all platforms on June 25! https://fron.dev/dc30
